[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 10111011 6
2 11011101 6
3 10101011 5
4 00111001 4
5 10000001 2
6 11111001 6
7 10000100 2

70 07 10010100 3
